contentBody.description: Target customer profiles (CISO, SecOps, compliance teams).

sections.content:
🛡️ Cirrus Securely Partner Enablement Program

Program Overview

The Selling Cirrus Securely Enablement Program empowers Cirrus Partners to position, demo, and sell Cirrus’s cybersecurity platform with confidence.
Through guided learning paths, sales playbooks, and interactive simulations, partners will gain the expertise to address customer security needs, differentiate Cirrus’s Zero-Trust value proposition, and close deals faster.

🎯 Program Goals

Enable partners to articulate Cirrus’s Secure Advantage using real-world threat scenarios.
Equip partner sellers with the tools, demos, and compliance messaging needed to engage CIO and CISO buyers.
Validate partner readiness through badges, certifications, and deal registration incentives.

📚 Enablement Tracks

TrackDescriptionOutcome
1. Foundation: Understanding Cirrus SecurityLearn Cirrus’s Zero-Trust architecture, data encryption model, and compliance standards (SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR).Secure Seller Foundation Badge
2. Discovery & QualificationIdentify customer security gaps, position Cirrus modules, and use guided discovery templates.Security Discovery Practitioner Badge
3. Demo Mastery: Cirrus Secure CloudPractice live demos with built-in objection handling (AI Threat Response, PartnerShield analytics).Certified Demo Specialist
4. Deal Execution & Trust FrameworkLearn secure contracting, data sharing policies, and co-sell processes with Cirrus account teams.Secure Deal Champion Certification



🧠 Learning Components

Guided Modules: Interactive content hosted in the Cirrus Partner Portal.
Scenario Simulations: Role-play customer objections with “AI ThreatBot” simulation.
Knowledge Checks: Quick quizzes and micro-badges for each learning stage.
Certification Exam: 20-question exam + recorded demo submission.

💰 Partner Incentives

Secure Seller Certification = 2× Deal Registration Multiplier
Top 10 Certified Sellers invited to Cirrus’s annual Cyber Leadership Summit.
Enablement completion unlocks co-marketing credits and access to Cirrus Secure Labs.

📈 Measurement & Success Metrics

MetricTarget
Partner Participation80% of active sellers
Certification Completion65% within 60 days
Registered Secure Deals+25% QoQ
Partner CSAT (Program)>90%



🚀 Launch Plan

PhaseTimelineKey Activities
Phase 1 – PilotNovember 2025Invite top 25 partners, gather feedback
Phase 2 – Global RolloutJanuary 2026Enable all Cirrus Secure Partners via portal
Phase 3 – Continuous LearningOngoingQuarterly updates, new modules, threat simulations
